subcategory: Animated background with moving gradient lines
use_cases: Hero section background with animated visual interest for landing pages
CTA section with dynamic moving line effects
Full-screen animated backgrounds for immersive web experiences
Tech product landing pages requiring motion effects

ai_summary: A dynamic animated background component featuring horizontal gradient lines that sweep across a dark grid. The component creates a tech-forward, energetic atmosphere with SVG corner accents and smooth continuous motion, ideal for hero or CTA sections.
